chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Months of Hajj, the Months of Pilgrimage, and the Sacred Months

text: 2961 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَا خَلَقَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي اَلْأَرْضِ بُقْعَةً أَحَبَّ إِلَيْهِ مِنَ اَلْكَعْبَةِ وَ لاَ أَكْرَمَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْهَا وَ لَهَا حَرَّمَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ، اَلْأَشْهُرَ اَلْحُرُمَ اَلْأَرْبَعَةَ فِي كِتَابِهِ «۝ يَوْمَ خَلَقَ اَلسَّمٰاوٰاتِ وَ اَلْأَرْضَ ۝» ثَلاَثَةٌ مِنْهَا مُتَوَالِيَةٌ لِلْحَجِّ وَ شَهْرٌ مُفْرَدٌ لِلْعُمْرَةِ رَجَبٌ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2961 - Imam (as) said:
"Allah (swt), the Exalted, has not created on the earth a spot more beloved to Him than the Ka'bah, nor more honored by Him. For its sake, Allah (swt), the Exalted, sanctified the four sacred months in His Book 'on the day He created the heavens and the earth' (Surah At-Tawbah 9:36).
Three of these months are consecutive for Hajj, and one is designated specifically for Umrah, which is Rajab."
